channel.title: Yan Leng — Weekly Research Digest
channel.description: Weekly AI-curated digest of new papers and GitHub repos relevant to network science, LLM interpretability, human-AI decision making, causal inference, and computational social science.
channel.itunes:author: Yan Leng Research Digest
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly paper digest covering PNAS, Nature, Science, NeurIPS, ICML, Management Science, and more. Each episode summarizes top papers with ratings and connections to active research projects.

item.title: Apr 15: Prompt Sensitivity, Collective LLM Behavior, Causal ML
item.description: Hey Yan — 38 papers this week. Top picks: benchmarking prompt sensitivity (connects to your Management Science paper), visual preference optimization via DPO, and a framework for validating collective behavior in LLM societies. Deep dives on the top 5, quick hits on 7 more, plus GitHub trending repos.
item.itunes:summary: Conversational walkthrough: 5 deep dives + 7 quick hits. Prompt sensitivity, visual DPO, collective LLM behavior, causal ML for treatment effects, and LLM interpretability tools.
